command_palette.title: Command Palette / Quick Search
command_palette.description: Trigger: ⌘K. Surface-2 bg. Input 16px. Results with diamond markers.

cookie_consent.title: Cookie Consent
cookie_consent.description: Fixed bottom, surface-2 bg, border-top. Accept All primary + Customize ghost.
cookie_consent.consent_text: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing, you agree to our cookie policy.

back_to_top.title: Back to Top
back_to_top.description: Fixed bottom-right. Visible after scroll >300px. Icon button style.

clipboard.title: Copy to Clipboard
clipboard.description: Idle: Copy icon. Click: ✓ + 'Copied!' green. Reset 2s. Used on code blocks, URLs.

dropdown.title: Dropdown Menu
dropdown.description: surface-2 bg. Hover: yellow bg tint + text. Danger: red variant. Section labels.

context_menu.title: Context Menu
context_menu.description: Same styling as Dropdown. Right-click trigger. Keyboard shortcut hints.

filter_bar.title: Filter Bar
filter_bar.description: Compact bar for multi-select filtering. Dropdown triggers for each filter category. Active chips with dismiss. Optional inline search slot.

sort_control.title: Sort Control
sort_control.description: Tri-state sort row: asc → desc → none. ▲/▼ direction indicators. Orbitron uppercase labels. Supports multiple sort columns.

bottom_sheet.title: Bottom Sheet
bottom_sheet.description: Mobile-first overlay sliding up from the screen bottom. Backdrop click dismisses. Drag handle with swipe-down gesture (120px threshold). Snap-point support.

pull_to_refresh.title: Pull to Refresh
pull_to_refresh.description: Mobile pull-to-refresh with 5-phase state machine: idle → pulling → threshold → refreshing → complete. Diamond spinner. Haptic feedback at threshold.

swipeable_item.title: Swipeable Item
swipeable_item.description: Touch-swipeable list item. Drag left to reveal left action (appears on right), drag right to reveal right action (appears on left). Auto-triggers at 160px.

rating.title: Rating
rating.description: Diamond ◆/◇ rating selector. Hover preview with keyboard navigation (←/→). Configurable max rating and size. Read-only mode for display.

file_upload.title: File Upload
file_upload.description: Drag-and-drop upload zone with 8 visual states: idle, hover, dragging, drag-invalid, uploading (with progress bar), success, error, disabled. Per-file item list with thumbnails.

session_timeout.title: Session Timeout Modal
session_timeout.description: Dialog warning of imminent session expiry. Countdown in Orbitron font turns orange at 2 min, red + pulsing at 1 min. Auto-logout at 0:00.

carousel.title: Carousel
carousel.description: CSS scroll-snap carousel with ◆/◇ diamond dot indicators. Optional autoplay. Arrow navigation buttons. Loop and keyboard support.

resizable.title: Resizable Panels
resizable.description: Resizable panel layout using react-resizable-panels. Endfield-themed ◆ resize handle. Supports horizontal and vertical panel splits.

theme_switcher.title: Theme Switcher
theme_switcher.description: Diamond toggle button for light/dark theme. Persists to localStorage under key 'ef-theme'. Reads initial state from localStorage on mount.

command-palette.onSelect: Callback when a result is selected

api.useCommandPalette: Hook with Cmd+K shortcut binding and focus management.

kbd.4: Cycle focus within the dialog (focus trap)

back-to-top.threshold: Scroll distance in px before button appears

copy-clipboard.resetDelay: Time in ms before resetting to idle state

dropdown.groups: Grouped menu items with optional section labels

context-menu.items: Context menu items with optional keyboard shortcut hints
context-menu.children: Target area that triggers context menu on right-click

filter-bar.filters: Array of filter definitions with options
filter-bar.activeFilters: Record of filter id to selected values

sort-control.direction: Current sort direction: asc | desc | none
sort-control.onSortChange: Callback with id and new direction

bottom-sheet.onClose: Called when backdrop clicked or handle dragged down
bottom-sheet.title: Optional sheet header title

pull-to-refresh.onRefresh: Async function called when refresh triggered
pull-to-refresh.threshold: Pull distance in px before refresh triggers (default: 60)

swipeable-item.leftSwipeAction: Action revealed by left swipe (shows on right)
swipeable-item.rightSwipeAction: Action revealed by right swipe (shows on left)

session-timeout.onExtend: Called when user clicks STAY CONNECTED
session-timeout.onLogout: Called when user clicks LOG OUT
session-timeout.warningAt: Seconds threshold to show urgent styling (default: 60)

carousel.loop: Loop back to first slide from last
